beIN SPORTS 1.title: Arsenal vs Fulham - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Arsenal have never lost in 32 home league games against Fulham, the most any side has faced another without defeat in English Football League history. Fulham have won just one of their last 15 Premier League games against Arsenal, a 2-1 home win in December 2023.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Paris SG have won only one of their last four Ligue 1 matches against Lorient. Following their 1-1 draw at the Moustoir on 29 October, PSG could endure their first winless season against FCL since 2010-11. Lorient are unbeaten in their last two Ligue 1 away games against Paris SG. Among current top-flight clubs, only Monaco  have a higher away win percentage against PSG than FCL.

beIN SPORTS 3.title: Valencia vs Atlético De Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 34
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Valencia CF have lost their last four LaLiga matches against Atlético de Madrid and have never lost five consecutive top-flight games against them in their history. beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Deportivo Alavés vs Athletic Bilbao - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 34
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Deportivo Alavés vs Athletic Bilbao - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 34
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Deportivo Alavés have won only one of their last eight LaLiga matches against Athletic Club, a 1-0 victory in their most recent league meeting in September 2025. The Vitoria side have only once managed back-to-back league wins against Athletic Club in their history, doing so between February and October 2020. Athletic Club have picked up points in each of their last three away LaLiga games against Deportivo Alavés ; they have not enjoyed a longer unbeaten run away to the Vitoria side in the competition since their first seven visits between 1931 and 2000.

beIN SPORTS 6.original_title: Nantes vs Olympique Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
beIN SPORTS 6.title: Nantes vs Olympique Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
beIN SPORTS 6.desc: Nantes have won only one of their last 11 Ligue 1 games against Marseille, but that was the most recent one on 4th January away from home. The last time FCN managed two consecutive wins against OM was in 2018-19 - 3-2 at the Beaujoire and then 2-1 at the Vélodrome. Nantes are currently on a six-game winless streak at home against Marseille in Ligue 1, and could equal their longest winless run against this opponent, dating back to September 1988-April 1997. Only Paris SG  have beaten Nantes more times at home than OM.
